2606.13241.title: Brick: Spatial Capability Routing for the Mixture-of-Models (MoM) Paradigm
2606.13241.paper_summary: Defining query difficulty is one of the hardest problems in deployment engineering. Existing LLM routers rely on surface features such as domain labels, keywords, and token count, ignoring the within-domain variance that actually determines model success. Frontier models cost ten to one hundred times more than local open-weight models, so at production scale even small per-request savings become a direct cloud-bill lever. We present Brick, a multimodal router that scores each model on six capability dimensions, combines this with a per-query difficulty estimate, and dispatches via a cost-penalized geometric rule. A continuous preference knob lets operators slide between max-quality and max-saving profiles at deploy time. On a benchmark of 5,504 queries, Brick at max-quality reaches 76.98% accuracy, beating the best single model (75.02%) and all tested routers. At a neutral cost-quality profile, Brick achieves 74.11% accuracy at 4.71x lower cost than always using the strongest model. At min-cost, it cuts cost 22.15x with 11.85 points accuracy loss. Median latency drops from 51.2s to 22.8s.
2606.13241.paper_summary_zh: 定義查詢難度是部署工程中最困難的問題之一。現有的 LLM 路由器依賴於表面特徵，如領域標籤、關鍵字和標記數，忽略了實際決定模型成功的領域內變異。前沿模型的成本是本地開放權重模型的十倍到一百倍，因此在生產規模下，即使是每次請求的小額節省也成為直接的雲計費杠杆。我們提出了 Brick，一種多模態路由器，對每個模型在六個能力維度上進行評分，並將其與每個查詢的難度估計相結合，通過成本懲罰幾何規則進行調度。連續的偏好旋鈕讓操作員在部署時在最大質量和最大節省配置之間滑動。在 5,504 個查詢的基準測試中，Brick 在最大質量下達到 76.98% 的準確率，超越了最佳單一模型（75.02%）和所有測試過的路由器。在中性成本-質量配置下，Brick 以比始終使用最強模型低 4.71 倍的成本達到 74.11% 的準確率。在最低成本下，它將成本削減 22.15 倍，準確率損失 11.85 點。中位延遲從 51.2 秒降至 22.8 秒。
2606.13241.author: Francesco Massa et.al.
